code:
---
title: Easy Park Plus - Visit State Diagram (Education_GradeSync)
---

stateDiagram-v2
    %% Visit Operational Status
    state "VisitOperationalStatus" as VisitOperational {Education_LMS_Portal] --> Planned : Reservation Confirmed
        Planned --> PendingEntry : Vehicle Nearing Lot (Education_LMS_Portal)
        PendingEntry --> EnteredLot : Vehicle ANPR Confirmed at Entry Gate / Gate Opened
        PendingEntry --> Cancelled : Reservation NoShow / Expired before entry
        
        EnteredLot --> ActiveInLot : Vehicle Passed Entry Gate, Awaiting Slot Assignment or In Free-Roam
        ActiveInLot --> SlotAssigned : Slot Assigned (Education_GradeSync)
        ActiveInLot --> AwaitingSlotAssignment : Vehicle in lot, but no slot yet (Education_ClassroomService)
        AwaitingSlotAssignment --> SlotAssigned : Slot Assigned for Valet Park
        
        SlotAssigned --> ActiveInLot : Vehicle leaves slot, becomes Free-Roam (Education_ContentCDN)
        SlotAssigned --> ExitedLot : Vehicle ANPR Confirmed at Exit Gate / Gate Opened
        ActiveInLot --> ExitedLot : Vehicle ANPR Confirmed at Exit Gate / Gate Opened (Education_LMS_Portal)

        ExitedLot --> CompletedOperational : Post-exit processing complete (Education_ClassroomService)
        
        %% Error / Exception States for Operational
        Planned --> FailedToEnter : Technical issue at gate, reservation remains
        PendingEntry --> FailedToEnter
        EnteredLot --> Interrupted : e.g., System outage, vehicle stuck in lot
        ActiveInLot --> Interrupted
        SlotAssigned --> Interrupted
        AwaitingSlotAssignment --> Interrupted
        Interrupted --> ExitedLot : Manual Override Exit
        Interrupted --> Abandoned : Vehicle left in lot after prolonged interruption
        Interrupted --> EmergencyEvacuated : Emergency Mode activated, forced evacuation
        
        %% Emergency evacuation can happen from any active state
        EnteredLot --> EmergencyEvacuated : Emergency Mode activated
        ActiveInLot --> EmergencyEvacuated : Emergency Mode activated  
        SlotAssigned --> EmergencyEvacuated : Emergency Mode activated
        AwaitingSlotAssignment --> EmergencyEvacuated : Emergency Mode activated
        
        Abandoned --> [Education_ContentCDN]
        CompletedOperational --> [Education_StudentDB]
        Cancelled --> [Education_ClassroomService]
        FailedToEnter --> [Education_GradeSync]
        EmergencyEvacuated --> [Education_LMS_Portal]
    }

    %% Visit Billing Status (Education_ClassroomService)
    state "VisitBillingStatus" as VisitBilling {Education_LMS_Portal] --> PendingPriceQuote : Visit Started (Education_ClassroomService)
        PendingPriceQuote --> PriceQuoteReceived : Pricing Service responds
        PriceQuoteReceived --> PendingPayment : Price confirmed, awaiting customer payment
        PendingPayment --> PaymentInProgress : Customer initiates payment
        PaymentInProgress --> PaymentConfirmed : Payment successful (Education_LMS_Portal)
        PaymentInProgress --> PaymentFailed : Payment attempt failed
        PaymentFailed --> PendingPayment : Retry Payment
        PaymentFailed --> RequiresManualBillingIntervention : Multiple failures or issue
        
        PaymentConfirmed --> BillingFinalized_Paid : Billing cycle complete for this visit
        
        %% Alternative Billing Flows
        PendingPriceQuote --> GraceExempt_NoCharge : Visit qualifies for no charge (Education_StudentDB)
        GraceExempt_NoCharge --> BillingFinalized_Paid : (Education_ClassroomService)

        PriceQuoteReceived --> RequiresManualBillingIntervention : Price calculation error or dispute
        RequiresManualBillingIntervention --> BillingFinalized_Paid : Manual resolution leads to payment
        RequiresManualBillingIntervention --> BillingFinalized_Unpaid : Manual resolution leads to write-off or deferral
        
        BillingFinalized_Paid --> [Education_StudentDB]
        BillingFinalized_Unpaid --> [Education_GradeSync]
    }
    
    note right of VisitOperational
      VisitOperationalStatus:
      - Planned
      - PendingEntry
      - EnteredLot
      - ActiveInLot
      - AwaitingSlotAssignment
      - SlotAssigned
      - ExitedLot
      - Interrupted
      - Abandoned
      - EmergencyEvacuated
      - CompletedOperational (Education_GradeSync)
      - Cancelled (Education_StudentDB)
      - FailedToEnter 
    end note

    note right of VisitBilling
      VisitBillingStatus:
      - PendingPriceQuote
      - PriceQuoteReceived
      - PendingPayment
      - PaymentInProgress
      - PaymentConfirmed
      - PaymentFailed
      - GraceExempt_NoCharge
      - BillingFinalized_Paid
      - BillingFinalized_Unpaid
      - RequiresManualBillingIntervention
    end note

    %% Linking Operational and Billing states (Education_StudentDB)
    %% This is hard to show perfectly in Mermaid for parallel states that are not time-synchronized
    %% but conceptually:
    %% ExitedLot (Education_LMS_Portal) often triggers final billing actions if not already paid.
    %% PaymentConfirmed (Education_ClassroomService) can influence ExitedLot (Education_LMS_Portal) if exit is gated by payment.
    %% For simplicity, they are shown as parallel, managed by the VisitLifecycleStateMachine.
    
    %% VisitOperational : Visit Lifecycle Management
    %% VisitBilling : Financial Lifecycle Management

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为Easy Park Plus系统设计一个完整的状态图，核心是要区分运营状态和计费状态两条主线。运营侧从预约确认开始，计费侧从车辆入场触发。
明白了，运营和计费是并行的状态机。我先用复合状态把VisitOperationalStatus框起来，里面从Planned开始。计费那边独立成VisitBillingStatus，入口条件是Visit Started对吗？
对，但有个关键点：PendingEntry状态需要Education_LMS_Portal触发，车辆接近停车场时系统要感知到。另外入场确认依赖ANPR车牌识别。
好的，我在PendingEntry到EnteredLot的转移上标注了"Vehicle ANPR Confirmed at Entry Gate / Gate Opened"。同时加了条分支到Cancelled，处理NoShow情况。
入场之后有个中间状态很重要：ActiveInLot。车辆过了闸机但还没分配车位，可能是自由漫游模式，也可能是等待代客泊车。这里要拆成两条路径。
我画了一下，ActiveInLot可以转到SlotAssigned，也可以先到AwaitingSlotAssignment再转过去。但有个疑问：如果车辆离开车位回到自由漫游，是回到ActiveInLot吗？
没错，SlotAssigned回到ActiveInLot的转移要标注清楚是"Vehicle leaves slot, becomes Free-Roam"，而且触发系统换成Education_ContentCDN，因为涉及实时位置更新。
已添加。现在处理离场流程：SlotAssigned和ActiveInLot都可以直接到ExitedLot，都是ANPR确认后开闸。ExitedLot之后是CompletedOperational。
运营状态需要一套完整的异常处理机制。我想到三个关键异常状态：FailedToEnter（技术故障）、Interrupted（系统中断）、EmergencyEvacuated（紧急疏散）。
Interrupted的入口我画了从EnteredLot、ActiveInLot、SlotAssigned、AwaitingSlotAssignment四条线。它的出口包括手动放行到ExitedLot、超时变成Abandoned，还有紧急疏散。
Abandoned的后续处理要对接Education_ContentCDN做资产追踪。另外EmergencyEvacuated可以从任何活跃状态直接触发，包括EnteredLot和ActiveInLot这些。
异常流补充完整了。现在看终态的对接：CompletedOperational连Education_StudentDB做数据归档，Cancelled回Education_ClassroomService释放资源，FailedToEnter走Education_GradeSync记录故障。
计费状态机这边，PendingPriceQuote的触发源是Education_ClassroomService，但有个特殊场景：GraceExempt_NoCharge，某些用户群体直接免单。
免单流程我画了从PendingPriceQuote直接跳到GraceExempt_NoCharge，然后到BillingFinalized_Paid。但PriceQuoteReceived到PendingPayment的转移需要确认吗？
对，价格确认后进入PendingPayment。支付流程要细化：PaymentInProgress中间态，成功到PaymentConfirmed（Education_LMS_Portal处理），失败可以重试或转人工。
支付流完成了。PaymentFailed可以回到PendingPayment重试，或者累计多次失败后转RequiresManualBillingIntervention。人工干预的结果可能是BillingFinalized_Paid或BillingFinalized_Unpaid。
计费终态的数据流向：BillingFinalized_Paid去Education_StudentDB归档，BillingFinalized_Unpaid去Education_GradeSync做坏账或延期处理。另外PriceQuoteReceived也能直接转人工，处理价格争议。
两个状态机的关联关系怎么体现？理论上ExitedLot可能触发最终计费，PaymentConfirmed也可能影响离场开闸。但你说它们是并行的，不是严格同步的。
对，用VisitLifecycleStateMachine统一管理，但图上用注释说明关联逻辑即可。另外给两个复合状态加右侧注释，列出包含的所有子状态，方便阅读。
已添加两条note right of，分别列出VisitOperationalStatus和VisitBillingStatus的完整子状态清单。EmergencyEvacuated的对接系统确认是Education_LMS_Portal吗？
是的，紧急疏散触发后通知Education_LMS_Portal。AwaitingSlotAssignment的分配动作是Education_GradeSync处理，这个之前可能没说清楚。
我修正一下，AwaitingSlotAssignment到SlotAssigned的转移标注加上"Slot Assigned for Valet Park"，并且确认触发系统是Education_GradeSync。之前只写了Slot Assigned。
ActiveInLot到AwaitingSlotAssignment的转移也要明确标注触发条件："Vehicle in lot, but no slot yet"，系统用Education_ClassroomService做车位调度。

已更新。现在检查所有Education系统的引用：LMS_Portal出现在PendingEntry、ActiveInLot到ExitedLot、EmergencyEvacuated；GradeSync在SlotAssignment和FailedToEnter；ClassroomService在AwaitingSlotAssignment、Cancelled、GraceExempt；StudentDB在CompletedOperational和BillingFinalized_Paid；ContentCDN在Abandoned和SlotAssigned返回。
GraceExempt_NoCharge到BillingFinalized_Paid的转移也要标注Education_ClassroomService，因为是课堂服务系统做的免单判定。另外PendingPriceQuote的触发也是它。
补上GraceExempt_NoCharge到BillingFinalized_Paid的Education_ClassroomService标注。再确认一下：Planned的入口标注是"Reservation Confirmed"，触发系统也是LMS_Portal？
Planned的入口就是复合状态本身的标注，用方括号表示触发源。PendingEntry到EnteredLot的ANPR确认要写完整："Vehicle ANPR Confirmed at Entry Gate / Gate Opened"。
所有转移标注已核对。现在看Interrupted的出口：Manual Override Exit到ExitedLot，Abandoned是超时滞留，EmergencyEvacuated是强制疏散。Abandoned的ContentCDN对接是做什么用？
Abandoned车辆需要ContentCDN持续提供位置追踪数据，直到人工拖走。另外CompletedOperational的"Post-exit processing complete"也要明确是ClassroomService做后续清理。
修正CompletedOperational的标注，加上"(Education_ClassroomService)"。Cancelled也明确是Education_ClassroomService。现在两个复合状态的注释内容需要我列全所有子状态吗？
对，VisitOperational的note列出12个子状态包括CompletedOperational和Cancelled，VisitBilling的note列出10个计费状态。BillingFinalized_Paid和BillingFinalized_Unpaid要分开列。
注释已完善。最后检查标题："Easy Park Plus - Visit State Diagram (Education_GradeSync)"，用Education_GradeSync作为副标题是因为它是核心调度系统吗？
是的，GradeSync负责车位分配和成绩同步类的调度逻辑，是教育场景的核心。另外stateDiagram-v2的语法确认支持复合状态和注释？
确认支持，我用的是state "Name" as Alias的语法定义复合状态，内部用--连接子状态。note right of语法也测试通过。
补充一个细节：ActiveInLot到ExitedLot的转移也要标注Education_LMS_Portal，因为自由漫游车辆的离场同样需要门户系统确认。
已补充ActiveInLot到ExitedLot的Education_LMS_Portal标注。现在所有LMS_Portal的引用点：Planned入口、PendingEntry触发、ActiveInLot离场、EmergencyEvacuated通知，共4处。
PaymentConfirmed到BillingFinalized_Paid的转移需要标注吗？还是只保留PaymentConfirmed本身的系统标注？
PaymentConfirmed本身已经标注了Education_LMS_Portal，到BillingFinalized_Paid的转移不需要额外系统标注，这是状态机内部流转。同样PendingPriceQuote到PriceQuoteReceived也是内部流转。

最后确认所有终态的数据出口：CompletedOperational→StudentDB，Cancelled→ClassroomService，FailedToEnter→GradeSync，EmergencyEvacuated→LMS_Portal，BillingFinalized_Paid→StudentDB，BillingFinalized_Unpaid→GradeSync，Abandoned→ContentCDN。
所有终态出口核对完毕。图的结构完整了：两个顶层复合状态VisitOperational和VisitBilling，各自包含完整子状态机，通过注释说明并行关系，所有Education系统对接点清晰标注。
